# Switzerland vs. Canada projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup Group B decider at BC Place

Marios Hamboullas

•

SN

Add The Sporting News on Google

Switzerland and Canada meet on Tuesday at BC Place in Vancouver in a World Cup clash that will likely determine who finishes top of Group B.

Both sides head into matchday three on four points after unbeaten starts to the tournament, with Canada holding a narrow edge on goal difference following their 6-0 win over Qatar.

news_items.title: Switzerland vs Canada Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire
news_items.text:
Switzerland vs Canada Preview, Lineups & Team News | RotoWire

# Switzerland vs Canada Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Group B

Switzerland vs Canada clash in Vancouver for their decisive 2026 World Cup Group B finale. Predicted lineups, team news, tactical breakdown and score prediction.

Updated on June 24, 2026 2:01AM EST

Share

By:

Pierre Courtin

Adam Zdroik

Updated on June 24, 2026 2:01AM EST

World Cup

Subscribe Log In

From the latest news to creating the best starting lineup, we've got you covered - Sign-up today

# Switzerland vs Canada Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Group B

The Group B finale is a straight shootout for top spot. Switzerland and Canada are level on four points, ahead of Bosnia and Qatar, and this meeting at BC Place in Vancouver decides who wins the group, with the loser still very likely to advance as a runner-up or best third. For co-hosts Canada, in front of a home crowd, it is a chance to top a World Cup group for the first time.

Both have been solid rather than spectacular, and b

# Switzerland vs. Canada projected lineups, starting 11 for World Cup Group B decider at BC Place

Marios Hamboullas

•

SN

Add The Sporting News on Google

Switzerland and Canada meet on Tuesday at BC Place in Vancouver in a World Cup clash that will likely determine who finishes top of Group B.

Both sides head into matchday three on four points after unbeaten starts to the tournament, with Canada holding a narrow edge on goal difference following their 6-0 win over Qatar.

While qualification for the knockout stage remains within re"}

# Switzerland vs Canada Preview: Predicted Lineups, Team News & Tactical Analysis | 2026 World Cup Group B

The Group B finale is a straight shootout for top spot. Switzerland and Canada are level on four points, ahead of Bosnia and Qatar, and this meeting at BC Place in Vancouver decides who wins the group, with the loser still very likely to advance as a runner-up or best third. For co-hosts Canada, in front of a home crowd, it is a chance to top a World Cup group for the first time.
